3188530.name: Golfie Up!
3188530.description:
Golfie Up! is a precision platformer that rolls you to the edge of glory and the brink of madness! Jump, roll, and master the art of momentum in a world where every slip could send you tumbling back down. Play solo or with up to 8 friends, collect hidden treasures, and test your skills in heart-racing speedruns. Just remember: falling is part of the game—but the climb is always worth it!

In the spirit of Getting Over It with Bennett Foddy and Chained Together, this game tests your skills, patience, and possibly also friendships!

In a nutshell:

  • Difficult roll-a-ball-y platforming with nuanced jump and recovery mechanics.

  • Use fun power-ups to boost, fly, teleport, or even explode!

  • You will fall, and you will lose progress, but it’s never unfair! 

  • Gather collectibles in hidden- or extra challenging places!

  • Bring a friend on the journey for a co-op experience

  • Try speedrunning to get on the leaderboards!

From momentum-based challenges to anxiety-inducing jumps, there is much fun (and pain) to be had in this game!
3188530.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 丹麦语, 日语, 韩语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文
